content:
✨ awesome-android-root | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To serve as a centralized, curated resource for discovering and learning about Android rooting tools, modules, and guides.
✨ Key Features: • Extensive collection of 500+ root apps and modules • Support for Magisk, KernelSU, and LSPosed (Xposed) • Step-by-step rooting guides for diverse devices
📖 Summary: Awesome Android Root is a comprehensive hub for Android rooting enthusiasts, offering a curated collection of over 500 top root apps, Magisk, KernelSU, and LSPosed modules, alongside detailed rooting guides for various devices. It aims to be a central resource for all things related to rooting and customizing Android devices.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 restreamer | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a self-hosted, flexible, and cost-effective solution for individuals and organizations to manage and distribute live video streams across multiple platforms and websites.
✨ Key Features: • Self-hosted streaming server
📖 Summary: Restreamer is a self-hosted, open-source streaming server solution that allows users to ingest live video streams (e.g., from OBS) via RTMP and SRT protocols. It then enables re-streaming to various platforms like YouTube, Twitch, and Vimeo, or embedding a player directly into a website. The solution offers a user-friendly interface, supports multiple codecs and protocols, and includes features for hardware acceleration and monitoring.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ Triangle-Downloader | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Downloading YouTube video, audio, and subtitles directly from the YouTube player interface.
✨ Key Features: • Download video (720p/1080p MP4) • Download audio (MP3) • Download subtitles (.txt) • Selectable playback fragment • Choice of video format (VP9/H.264)
📖 Summary: Triangle Downloader is a Chrome extension for downloading YouTube video, audio, and subtitles directly within the browser. It captures the player stream locally without relying on external tools or servers, offering options for video quality, audio format, and subtitle extraction.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 Menstrudel | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a private, offline, and intuitive mobile application for tracking their menstrual cycle, managing medications, and receiving timely reminders.
✨ Key Features: • Log with a Tap for periods • Track flow, pain, and symptoms • View menstrual history journal • Predictive forecasts for next period • Countdown to next cycle
📖 Summary: Menstrudel is a free, open-source, and privacy-focused period and pill tracking mobile application built with Flutter. It offers offline functionality for logging menstrual cycles, tracking symptoms, predicting future periods, and managing medication schedules.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 transcriber | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a private, self-hosted, and efficient solution for transcribing audio and video content from various sources, including YouTube and local files, using advanced AI models.
✨ Key Features: • YouTube & Local File Transcription • Real-Time Progress via WebSockets • Smart Media Library Management
📖 Summary: Transcriber is a self-hosted, open-source web application that leverages OpenAI Whisper and FastAPI for AI-powered audio and video transcription. It prioritizes user privacy by processing data locally and offers features like YouTube URL transcription, local file uploads, real-time progress updates via WebSockets, and a smart media library.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 ExploitDB-Hunter | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To efficiently search for and download security exploits from Exploit-DB via a command-line interface, streamlining the workflow for information security professionals.
✨ Key Features: • Search exploits by CVE ID or title • Download exploits directly from the command line • Interactive terminal interface for selecting exploits • Filter exploits by type, platform, port, and tags • Customizable download directory
📖 Summary: ExploitDB-Hunter is a lightweight Python command-line tool designed to simplify the process of searching and downloading exploits from the Exploit-DB database. It offers an interactive terminal interface, eliminating the need to manually browse the website.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
